reviews.review_description: everyone should have this game . it's really fun

reviews.review_title: Fun but needs a lot of work still...
reviews.review_description:
The game is fun but I wouldn't spend money on it in its current state. The work area is too big and even playing on stand mode you'll find yourself moving because you have a time limit to complete orders and in trying to do things faster you'll end up getting turned around in your play area. I found myself next to the stairs and luckily I looked because I would have fallen down. But the most irritating part is that you can't have a bunch of ingredients laying close to each other on the counters because if they get too close they'll snap together and mess up all your work. Also when you chop things with your knife the pieces shoot up and sometimes end up on the floor or snap together with another ingredient messing everything up! 
My suggestions are not making the ingredients snap together so easily or at the very least let us pull the ingredients apart in case that happens and make the work area smaller for standing/sitting mode.

reviews.review_title: like it but some problems still
reviews.review_description:
👉webnetka*com 🇬🇧 🇫🇷 metaquest*forumactif*com👈
I tried the demo but I still prefer "clash of chef"(which has a good UX and no glitch) 
And I hesitate to buy Sep'sDiner because of different little problems I encounter  :

- I had lot of trouble with icecream. Difficult to pick it, sometimes it restart, lot of time lost and Im still not sure of how to do to avoid this difficulties

- clients are complaining it takes too much time though I'm waiting for the machine to do the job and didn't loose any time ?!? 😡

- everything is far, I have to teleport for every single thing

- color of caramel and chocolate are not always so clear , and besides the picture of what clients want and what they finally get are not same

- when I cut things, there are always parts falling on the floor...

Has the definitive version resolved all this ?

I also don't like the fact we have to wait for restocking after taking anything : why this choice?!  (not even realistic 🙁)

Well, the game remains globally fun, but these small details prevent me from completely enjoying it and kind of disapoint me (because moreover, I really like the design and some other things)
==================================
Pour échanger vos expériences et vos avis:
 👉 metaquest*forumactif*com 👈
Pour les promos quest : 👉 webnetka*com 👈

So far my favorite VR game after getting the headset last week. The only issue I've found is the ice cream scoop doesn't seem to work correctly. 

Going to pickup the full version.
Bruh why did you. Copy 1v1.lol skins
This was a horrible experience, I would follow the steps and every time the food was done it wouldn't serve to the customers no matter what button I pressed, I definitely don't recommend this game

I would give myself more than enough room to play but while playing, the "kitchen" would totally move.  This would slowly result in me punching a bookshelf while trying to "fill a soda cup" or not being able to pick up something because it was now out of my guardian that was previously fine.  It's so disappointing because I genuinely loved the amount of game I was able to play!!!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your comment!
The default navigation mode will make you move around with the joysticks. You will find some navigation settings on the menu, please make sure to select "roomscale" if your guardian is big enough. That way you will avoid moving the kitchen by accidentally touching the joysticks. Hopefully that will fix your issue, otherwise do not hesitate to contact us on discord/by email and we'll find a solution together!

reviews.review_description:
In this demo, you have 3 locations where you can cook totally different food (like the Android game "cooking fever" to make money).

Positive:
- Great graphics
- Easy pace

Negative:
- does not work in stationary guardian. You will need quite some space. I am not sure if you can reset/set the direction
- no difficulty level like "cookout". This can make the game so hard it is impossible to pass levels. I stopped playing cookout due to the difficulty was too high from the let go
- you are only serving one customer at a time and have no idea what each customer want.
- no quit button

I hope the full version will allow:
- to serve multiple customers
- multiplayer... Auto connect with play with 1-3 random players to create mayhem like cookout
- be able to buy furniture like in cooking fever
- difficulty levels: easy, normal, and hard

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your interesting comment!
You can play in stationary guardian! In the settings (the gear button), you can choose between several navigation mode, including teleport or joystick navigation. You can even play sitting down if you wish, just select "seat". 
The levels become harder and harder, but there is also a "relax" mode to play peacefully, without the stressful timer. 
The customers orders are obviously random, and they are really specific. Indeed, on the full version you do have to serve up to 3 customers at the same time! 
About the quit button : inside a level, you can click on the menu button (flat button on your left controller) to pause the game, restart the level or return to the lobby. 
In full version you also have a multiplayer mode up to 4 players! 
We'll think about adding difficulty levels. Furniture will come! We're currently working on a big UI update, but next you'll be able to buy some customizations with the money you earn ingame!

reviews.review_description: The game is very fun and just what im looking for in a fast cooking game

reviews.review_title: Really fun w/ a few glitches
reviews.review_description: Some orders were rejected even when they seemed to be correct, and I could never get the ice cream scoop to work correctly. With that said, this game is great fun and can make for some real exercise if you move fast.
